Notes: UWO ranked 13th in the NCAA Div. III by D3hoops.com...UWO scored nine straight
points to take a 15-8 lead...Down 58-38, UWP goes on a 17-6 run to cut deficit
to 64-55 with 5:02 to play...UWP's Krajco, who entered the game averaging a
WIAC-leading 20.9 points per game, held to nine points on 4-of-10 shooting.
Game.Officials: Larry Dietz,  Jodi Duffe,  John Furrer
